title: An Act directing the city of Boston police department to waive the maximum age requirement for police officers for Elijah George Osborne

abstracts.abstract: By Mr. Collins, a petition (accompanied by bill, Senate, No. 3017) of Nick Collins (with the approval of the mayor and city council) for legislation to direct the city of Boston police department to waive the maximum age requirement for police officers for Elijah George Osborne.  Public Service.  [Local approval received.]

actions.description: Referred to the committee on Public Service
Hearing scheduled for 04/14/2026 from 02:00 PM-05:00 PM in A-2
Hearing scheduled for 04/14/2026 from 02:00 PM-05:00 PM in A-2

Hearing rescheduled to 04/14/2026 from 02:00 PM-02:20 PM in A-2                                                                                                                                                                                     and Virtual Hearing updated to New End Time
Bill reported favorably by committee and placed in the Orders of the Day for the next session
Read second and ordered to a third reading
